overall.description: Static aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the Night City skyline with corporate skyscrapers, a curved highway overpass, and an active construction site in the foreground under clear afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city overlook with highway interchange and construction zone

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from a high vantage point

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers forming the city skyline
two prominent matching high-rise towers standing taller than surrounding buildings
elevated multi-lane highway curving through the urban landscape
active development area with cranes and unfinished building foundations in the foreground
large industrial structures and storage facilities on the right horizon
lower density housing and apartment buildings on the left side
sweeping on-ramp connecting to the main highway artery

segments.scene_description: A static aerial panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis under clear afternoon skies. The scene captures the contrast between the gleaming corporate skyscrapers of the downtown skyline, including distinctive twin towers, and the raw construction site in the foreground. A curved highway overpass sweeps through the middle ground, while industrial warehouses and residential blocks fill out the urban sprawl. No movement or activity is visible in this stationary observation shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static aerial panorama of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, capturing the stark contrast between industrial decay and corporate opulence under a clear afternoon sky. It begins with a wide view of a raw construction site in the foreground, which serves as a gritty anchor to the scene. The perspective then extends across a curved highway overpass that sweeps through the middle ground, bridging the gap between residential blocks and industrial warehouses. Finally, the gaze settles on the distant downtown skyline, where gleaming corporate skyscrapers and distinctive twin towers rise sharply against the horizon.
